message:
✨ Add LLM-summarized session titles (#171)

- Add POST /api/terminals/:id/summarize endpoint that captures tmux pane
  content and sends it to ACP for a 5-word-or-less summary (15s timeout)
- Add capturePaneContent() to terminal-manager using tmux capture-pane
- Add summarizeTerminal() to web API client
- Add sparkle button on terminal tabs to manually trigger summarization
- Auto-summarize on first prompt detection (non-user-renamed tabs only)
- Store summarized title in tab name cache for persistence across refreshes
- Graceful fallback: if ACP/AI is unavailable, keeps existing session name

Signed-off-by: Andrew Anderson <andy@clubanderson.com>
